assets.usage: Primary filled CTA button. Use for main actions such as Shop Now, Order Now, or Browse Menu.
Secondary filled CTA button in softer harbor blue. Use for alternate actions such as Order Custom or View Specials.
Outlined CTA button. Use for low-commitment actions such as Learn More, About, or Details.
Large branded container card with circular logo treatment and Daniel Island location cue.
Feature card for artisan process, small-batch quality, or brand values.
Product card visual for bakery product listings, menu sections, and featured goods.
Testimonial card for customer reviews and social proof sections.
Input field visual for contact/order forms and inquiry pages.
Icon set with bakery, contact, commerce, and local/location symbols.
Section divider with coastal blue linework and wheat/botanical motif.
